package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_delete_in_loop_vs_new_map: `for k := range m { delete(m, k) }` patterns
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule615PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario615Positive(records []Rule615PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
